Ms. Ives filed her response by 2/23. Ms. Hinshaw stated it is too expensive for her client to file a claim. She wants the Court to take into account when determining additional fees requests. Mr. Trutner has received a check from Ms. Ives and he has mailed a Release of Lien to her. Ms. Ives has not seen it. She will record it when she gets it. Settlement issue is moot.
